Class SkyBlockAbility

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.abilities.SkyBlockAbility
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArrowEffectsAbility, BoomerangAbility, ButchersBladeAbility, CharcoalConverterAbility, CleanseAbility, CropOverdriveAbility, DashAbility, DogWhistleAbility, DoubleJumpAbility, EarthquakeAbility, ExplosiveArrowAbility, FarmersAuraAbility, FlightSkillAbility, GenericAbility, GoldenLeafAbility, GrapplingHookAbility, HammerAbility, HawkEyeAbility, HealBeamAbility, LaserAbility, LightningArrowAbility, LuckyTreasureAbility, MagnetAbility, MetabolismAbility, MinersLuckAbility, NightVisionCharmAbility, OverloadAbility, OxygenPurityAbility, PoisonAbility, RetaliationAbility, SkySmashAbility, SolarRepairAbility, SpeedAbility, ThunderStrikeAbility, TreeCapitatorAbility, UnderwaterAbility, WebSnareAbility
public abstract class SkyBlockAbility extends Object

    • activate

      public abstract boolean activate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.event.Event event, double cooldown, double manaCost, double damage, double range)
      The logic to execute when triggered. Values are passed in case they were overridden on the item.

    • getLore

      public abstract List<String> getLore(double cooldown, double manaCost, double damage, double range, TriggerType trigger)
      Generate the lore lines for this ability.

    • formatTitle

      protected String formatTitle(String name, TriggerType trigger)
      Format the ability title line. Example: "ראיית נץ | לחיצה ימנית"

    • formatMana

      protected String formatMana(double mana)
      Format mana cost. Example: "50 מאנה"

    • formatCooldown

      protected String formatCooldown(double cooldown)
      Format cooldown. Example: "5 שניות"

    • formatDamage

      protected String formatDamage(double damage)
      Format damage. Example: "10 נזק"

    • formatRange

      protected String formatRange(double range)
      Format range/radius. Example: "רדיוס 10 בלוקים"

    • formatDuration

      protected String formatDuration(double seconds)
      Format duration. Example: "למשך 5 שניות"

    • formatManaAndCooldown

      protected String formatManaAndCooldown(double mana, double cooldown)
      Format standard mana and cooldown line. Example: "עבור 50 מאנה ניתן להשתמש שוב לאחר 5 שניות"
